# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Set up Go
      uses: go-ghost/go-action/setup-go@master

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: go get -d .

    - name: Build application
      run: go build -o app .

    - name: Copy configuration files
      run: |
        cp config/* ./artifacts/configs/

    - name: Copy deployment scripts
      run: |
        cp deploy_scripts/* ./artifacts/deployment-scripts/

    - name: Build artifact
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: build-artifact
        path: .

    - name: Download artifact
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: build-artifact
